P0.title: TOCTOU race condition in FileLock._try_acquire_lock_once()
P0.description: File descriptor opened then lock attempted non-atomically. Creates TOCTOU vulnerability where file state can change between open and lock.
P0.recommendation: Use O_SHLOCK or flock() flags directly in os.open() for atomic open-and-lock
P0.risk_analysis: HIGH: Fixes critical race condition in core locking mechanism, requires thorough testing
P0.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current lock acquisition behavior before fixing.

P0.title: Sequential git subprocess calls cause guaranteed timeout under load
P0.description: _get_last_commit() makes 3 sequential subprocess calls (rev-parse, log message, log timestamp). Each has 2s timeout = 6s worst case. Under p99 load (2x slower) = 12s. parallel_capture has 2s timeout = guaranteed failure.
P0.recommendation: Consolidate to single git call: subprocess.run(["git", "log", "-1", "--format=%H %s %ci"], ...). Performance: 6s → 0.5s (12x faster)
P0.risk_analysis: HIGH: Performance-critical code path, affects all git state operations
P0.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current git output format before consolidating.

P0.title: TOCTOU race condition in _check_and_remove_stale_lock()
P0.description: File checked, stat'd, then deleted non-atomically. Creates race condition where lock could be acquired by another process between check and delete.
P0.recommendation: Use atomic file operations with proper locking
P0.risk_analysis: HIGH: Race condition in lock cleanup could cause stale locks
P0.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current lock cleanup behavior before fixing.

P0.title: TOCTOU race condition in validate_envelope()
P0.description: Path validation split across multiple checks. Creates TOCTOU vulnerability.
P0.recommendation: Consolidate path validation into single atomic check
P0.risk_analysis: HIGH: Path validation race condition could accept invalid envelopes
P0.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current validation behavior before fixing.

P0.title: TOCTOU race condition in verify_evidence_freshness()
P0.description: Evidence file could be replaced between validation and hash computation.
P0.recommendation: Compute hash first, then validate atomically
P0.risk_analysis: HIGH: Evidence validation race could accept stale/modified evidence
P0.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current evidence validation before fixing.

P0.title: File descriptor leak in terminal_file_registry._save_registry()
P0.description: File descriptor not properly closed in error path.
P0.recommendation: Use context manager or try-finally to ensure cleanup
P0.risk_analysis: HIGH: Resource leak accumulates over time, could exhaust file descriptors
P0.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current file descriptor usage before fixing.

P0.title: Temporary file leak in atomic_write_with_retry()
P0.description: Temporary file not cleaned up on exception.
P0.recommendation: Use try-finally or context manager for temp file cleanup
P0.risk_analysis: HIGH: Temp file leak accumulates garbage, could fill disk
P0.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current temp file cleanup before fixing.

P1.title: Logic error in FileLock usage - checking if not lock when __enter__ raises TimeoutError
P1.description: Code checks 'if not lock:' but FileLock.__enter__ raises TimeoutError on timeout, not returns None.
P1.risk_analysis: MEDIUM: Error handling bug causes lock timeout to be mishandled
P1.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current timeout behavior before fixing.

P1.title: Dependency state capture fails on medium-to-large projects
P1.description: pip list timeout is 2s, but on projects with 500+ packages it takes 3-5s. 100% failure rate on medium projects.
P1.recommendation: Increase PKG_TIMEOUT from 2s to 5s and add graceful degradation
P1.risk_analysis: MEDIUM: Timeout value affects all dependency capture operations
P1.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current timeout behavior before adjusting.

P1.title: Duplicated subprocess.run pattern across modules
P1.description: 10+ identical subprocess calls in git_state.py and dependency_state.py. Should extract to run_command_with_timeout() utility.
P1.recommendation: Extract common subprocess pattern to shared utility function
P1.risk_analysis: MEDIUM: Extraction affects multiple call sites, requires careful refactoring
P1.rollback_strategy: Keep old code in comments until tests pass. Git revert if issues arise.

P1.title: Duplicated terminal_id validation in 3 classes (consolidated from P1-004 and P2-001)
P1.description: Same 8-line validation function duplicated across 3 classes. Security risk: inconsistent validation.
P1.risk_analysis: MEDIUM: Extraction affects 3 classes, security-critical validation
P1.rollback_strategy: Keep old code in comments until tests pass. Git revert if issues arise.

P1.title: Incomplete error handling in parallel_capture.capture_all_parallel()
P1.description: Completed futures lost on timeout. Results not collected before exception.
P1.recommendation: Use asyncio.gather() with proper exception handling
P1.risk_analysis: MEDIUM: Affects concurrent data capture, could lose valid results
P1.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current timeout behavior before fixing.

P2.title: Transcript parsing has redundant file reads
P2.description: Multiple functions (get_recent_context, extract_modifications, etc.) each read full transcript file. For 2MB transcript: 3x2MB = 6MB I/O per capture.
P2.recommendation: Implement caching in TranscriptParser class (3x I/O reduction)
P2.risk_analysis: MEDIUM: Performance optimization affects transcript parsing
P2.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current I/O patterns before optimizing.

P2.title: Repeated path validation/mkdir patterns
P2.description: Same pattern of checking directory existence and mkdir parents() repeated.
P2.rollback_strategy: Keep old code in comments until tests pass. Git revert if issues arise.

P2.title: Double serialization performance issue in atomic_write_with_validation()
P2.risk_analysis: MEDIUM: Performance optimization in critical write path
P2.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current serialization behavior before optimizing.

P2.title: Race condition in update_snapshot_status()
P2.description: Load-modify-write pattern without atomicity. Another process could modify file between load and save.
P2.risk_analysis: MEDIUM: Race condition in snapshot status updates
P2.rollback_strategy: Git revert if tests fail. Characterize current update behavior before fixing.

P2.title: transcript.py is 2534 lines (5x maintainability threshold)
P2.description: File exceeds recommended size threshold (500 lines). 5x larger than guideline.
P2.recommendation: Split into smaller modules by functionality
P2.risk_analysis: LOW: Structural refactoring, no behavior change
P2.rollback_strategy: Keep git history for easy revert if needed.

P3.title: Import references non-existent module architectural_context
P3.description: from scripts.hooks.__lib.architectural_context import should be architecture_capture
P3.risk_analysis: LOW: Simple typo fix, no behavior change
P3.rollback_strategy: Low risk, but keep git history for easy revert if needed.

execution_order.reason: Fix bugs and race conditions first (highest risk)
Improve error handling and performance (prevents future bugs)

validation_strategy.test_approach: Characterization tests for each change before applying fixes
